# The BrijSeller Perfume Shop

> Welcome to The BrijSeller Perfume Shop — an online store for premium luxury perfumes and body sprays for men and women, with delivery across India. Prices are shown in Indian Rupees (₹).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Introduction to The BrijSeller Perfume Shop and featured luxury fragrances.
- [Shop Collections](/select-gender): Choose between the men's and women's fragrance collections.
- [Men's Collection](/products/men): Bold luxury perfumes and body sprays for men.
- [Women's Collection](/products/women): Elegant luxury perfumes and body sprays for women.

## Optional

- [Ordering Instructions](/instructions): Step-by-step guide on how to place an order.
